name: Gem Pickup
description: a sparkly ascending chime for collecting a gem or valuable
usage: Play on gem_ruby and other high-value pickups.

ai.prompt: Picking up a precious gemstone: a crystalline glassy chime with a delicate sparkling upward shimmer, jewel-like and magical yet grounded. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
